narration: Your bank charges nine hundred dollars to enroll you in their biweekly mortgage program. That same trick costs you nothing to pull off yourself, and here's exactly how.
visual: Dark background. Large '$900' text springs in red. House SVG slides up from bottom. Bank label with price tag badge. Sub-text 'for a trick that's completely FREE' fades in.

narration: Pay half your mortgage every two weeks instead of monthly. That gives you twenty-six half-payments a year — which sneaks in one extra full payment. No budget change needed.
visual: Light background. Two columns: 'MONTHLY' showing 12 circles, 'BIWEEKLY' showing 26 circles. '= ONE EXTRA PAYMENT/YEAR' highlighted box springs in below.

narration: That one extra payment a year cuts thirty-four thousand dollars of interest off a typical mortgage. You'll pay off a thirty-year loan four to five years ahead of schedule.
visual: Dark background. Animated counter climbs from $0 to $34,000. Two bars: red '30 YEARS' full width, green 'BIWEEKLY' shorter. '4-5 YEARS EARLIER' fades in.

narration: Banks know this trick works, so they sell it back to you for nine hundred dollars. They're literally charging you for something you already have the power to do right now.
visual: Light background. Bank building SVG springs in. Red '$900 FEE' badge hangs off the building. Large red X overlays the bank. 'THEY SELL YOU YOUR OWN TRICK' text appears.

narration: Here's the free version. Take your monthly payment and divide by twelve. Add that amount as extra principal every month. On a fifteen-hundred-dollar payment, that's just one-twenty-five extra.
visual: Dark background. Three step cards slide in sequentially: Step 1 'FIND YOUR MONTHLY PAYMENT', Step 2 'DIVIDE BY 12', Step 3 'ADD AS EXTRA PRINCIPAL'. Green banner: '$1,500 ÷ 12 = $125/MONTH EXTRA'.

narration: No enrollment fee. No bank program. No permission required. Just one small math move that saves you years and thirty-four thousand dollars. Follow for more tricks they profit from hiding.
visual: Light background. House SVG springs in with green checkmark circle. 'PAID OFF EARLY' banner. '$34,000 SAVED' and '5 YEARS FASTER' stats appear. Dark CTA box: 'FOLLOW FOR MORE TRICKS THEY HIDE'.
